arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola says ‘anything can happen’ amid England links
arts.sum: Guardiola’s Manchester City contract expires in the summer.

arts.ttl: Next England manager: Lee Carsley sends mixed messages over permanent job
arts.sum: England interim boss Lee Carsley refuses to rule himself out of the running for the permanent job despite admitting the role should go to a coach who has won silverware.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane tears into Trent Alexander-Arnold and explains why he will be 'punished' against 'better teams' - despite England star's stunning free-kick goal against Finland
arts.sum: The Liverpool star doubled England's lead with a gorgeous strike from 25 yards in the second half, helping Lee Carsley get back to winning ways.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola rejects rumours of agreeing England role for 2025
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has rejected rumours linking him with the England national team job in 2025. Guardiola’s future at Manchester City remains in doubt with his contract at the Premier League champions expiring at the end of the season. The club are keen for the former Barcelona boss to extend his stay in Manchester but Guardiola […] The post Pep Guardiola rejects rumours of agreeing England role for 2025 appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola drops huge hint on taking England job: "Anything can happen!"
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has won 18 trophies with Manchester City and many pundits believe could leave the club after remaining coy on his future - with the Spaniard now leaving the door open to taking the England job

arts.ttl: Greece 2-0 Republic of Ireland: Caoimhin Kelleher makes error as Greeks maintain advantage over England
arts.sum: Greece remain three points ahead of England after four straight wins

Lee Carsley was thrilled to see England back on track in their Nations League campaign with a 3-1 victory away to Finland on Sunday, but the stand-in manager remains steadfast in saying he was not thinking ahead to a permanent job.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola speaks out on his Man City future with his contract set to expire next year, amid links with becoming England's next permanent manager
arts.sum: Roy Keane has suggested that Guardiola should the next England manager , with the FA yet to appoint a permanent successor to Gareth Southgate.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley ‘definitely not’ ruling himself out of England job amid confusion
arts.sum: The interim boss guided England to a 3-1 win over Finland on Sunday night.

arts.ttl: Chelsea to receive €150m Cole Palmer offer
arts.sum: The 22-year-old left Pep Guardiola’s side to join Chelsea for €47m last summer and he has established himself as arguably the best player in the Premier League since his move to Stamford Bridge. Spanish outlet Fichajes have now reported that Man City are willing to pay as much as €150m to bring Palmer back to the club next year.
